FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Delegate ItemContainerFactory

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI ItemContainer chrome.

public delegate BoxEl ItemContainerFactory(int index, Element content, ItemChromeState state, Action<ItemContainerTrigger, KeyModifiers> onInteraction, Action<bool> onFocusChanged)

Parameters

index int
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.
content Element
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.
state ItemChromeState
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.
onInteraction Action<ItemContainerTrigger, KeyModifiers>
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.
onFocusChanged Action<bool>
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.

Returns

BoxEl
Custom item-container factory — the E11-L4 SKIN seam: the List/Grid presets + TreeView supply their WinUI item chrome (ListViewItemPresenter / GridView dual-border / TreeViewItem row) around the engine's ONE selection + keyboard substrate. The returned BoxEl must wire onInteraction (press/Enter/Space → the selector) and onFocusChanged (keyboard-current tracking), and should be Focusable so the engine focus ring lands on items. Null ⇒ the default WinUI chrome.
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
